findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 39. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the complementary landmark or aside is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The null landmark is contained in another landmark. [<aside>]

findings.description: The Coastal Habitat Protection Plan Timeline slide images (wildlife/habitat photos on the right side of the slide) are displayed differently in HTML - they appear as separate stacked images in a column rather than as a vertical strip alongside the table as in the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 shows wildlife photos as a narrow vertical strip to the right of the timeline table. HTML renders them as separate, larger images stacked above the table, disconnected from their original layout context.

findings.description: The Coastal Habitat Protection Plan Timeline slide layout is significantly altered - the PDF shows the table and images side by side, but the HTML separates the images from the table, placing images above and the table below.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 has a two-section layout with the timeline table on the left and wildlife photos on the right. HTML collapses this into a single-column layout with images stacked above the table.
